longcat-copilot.walkthrough.title: Get started with LongCat v2 for Copilot Chat
longcat-copilot.walkthrough.description: Configure your LongCat API Key and start using LongCat 2.0 in Copilot Chat.
longcat-copilot.walkthrough.setApiKey.de: Create and configure your LongCat API Key on longcat.chat, then paste it here to enable LongCat 2.0 in the model picker.
longcat-copilot.walkthrough.showModels.t: Choose LongCat 2.0 in the model picker
longcat-copilot.walkthrough.showModels.d: Open Copilot Chat and select LongCat 2.0 from the model dropdown. Supports thinking mode, tool calling, and 1M token context.
longcat-copilot.walkthrough.advancedSett: Customize base URL, model ID overrides, vision proxy, and debug logging.
longcat-copilot.config.title: LongCat v2 for Copilot Chat
longcat-copilot.config.debugMode.minimal: Only token usage statistics are logged to the output channel.
longcat-copilot.config.debugMode.metadat: Privacy-preserving diagnostic information is logged. Prompt and response content is never included.
longcat-copilot.config.debugMode.verbose: Full request/response dumps are written to disk, including prompt text, tool schemas, file snippets, and image descriptions. Use with caution.
usage.errorNoKey: No API Key set. Please set your LongCat API Key first.
usage.usageDesc1: LongCat does not provide a usage query API. Detailed usage is not available here.
usage.usageDesc2: Please visit the LongCat console to view detailed usage.
usage.pricingFootnote: 💡 LongCat 2.0 — Token-based balance. Prices above are for reference only.
usage.statusClickToLogin: Click to set LongCat API Key
usage.visionDesc: LongCat does not support native image input. Images are converted to text descriptions by the configured vision proxy.
usage.officialApiNote: Official API does not expose balance. Visit longcat.chat/platform/usage for details.
